description: Embed a web page or HTML-returning UDF in an iframe using http(s) URLs, $param URL templates, or {{udf}} placeholders.

src.description: Absolute http or https URL, optionally with $param references, or an exact UDF placeholder like {{udf}} or {{udf?name=$param}}.

title.description: Accessible title for the embedded content

allow.description: Optional allow attribute (e.g. camera; microphone; geolocation)

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "border-radius: 8px")

propsSchema.description: Embeds a web page or HTML-returning UDF in an iframe. Use for dashboards, docs, or any site that permits framing.
